recommendations.title: Blitz
recommendations.overview: A tough cop is dispatched to take down a serial killer who has been targeting police officers.

recommendations.title: Bullet
recommendations.overview: A tough, Jewish ex-con just released from prison crosses a powerful drug dealer and former prison rival in his return to a life of crime.

recommendations.title: Dahmer
recommendations.overview: On February 15, 1992 in Milwaukee, Wisconsin, Jeffrey Dahmer, one of the world's most infamous serial killers, was convicted of 15 counts of murder and sentenced to 937 years in federal prison. This movie is based on events from his life.

recommendations.title: Tiger House
recommendations.overview: A young gymnast battles a group of bank robbers at the home of her boyfriend.

recommendations.title: Avengers Confidential: Black Widow & Punisher
recommendations.overview: When the Punisher takes out a black-market weapons dealer, he stumbles upon a far-reaching terrorist plot devised by a group known as Leviathan.

recommendations.title: Arkansas
recommendations.overview: Kyle and Swin live by the orders of an Arkansas-based drug kingpin named Frog, whom they've never met. But when a deal goes horribly wrong, the consequences are deadly.

recommendations.title: Boy Kills World
recommendations.overview: When his family is murdered, a deaf-mute named Boy escapes to the jungle and is trained by a mysterious shaman to repress his childish imagination and become an instrument of death.

recommendations.title: City Hall
recommendations.overview: The accidental shooting of a boy in New York City leads to an investigation by the Deputy Mayor, and unexpectedly far-reaching consequences.

recommendations.title: Cold War II
recommendations.overview: A suspected criminal mastermind escapes from police custody, throwing the city into turmoil. With the police department now divided, rival police chiefs are forced to take their fight to the streets of Hong Kong with deadly consequences.

recommendations.title: I Am Wrath
recommendations.overview: A man is out for justice after a group of corrupt police officers are unable to catch his wife's killer.
